text:
Mug (lit. , rom. Robu) is a spell card found in the Greed Island game. It allows a player to steal any one card from the target player.
__NOTOC__

Summary

This spell allows the caster to steal a card of their choice from the target player's binder. Its effects make it more powerful than attack spells such as "Thief" and "Pickpocket".

Card Description

{| class="article-table" style="height: 10px; color: #1A004C; background-color: #EEFFEE" cellspacing="0" cellpadding="0" border="0"
![Jap]
|No.1021 :: 
他プレイヤー１名の持ちカードをどれでも好きに１枚奪う。
|-
![Eng]
|No.1021 :: Mug 
Snatch any 1 card you like from 1 other named player.
|}

Trivia

In Chapter 133, Degiro attempted to use this card to steal "Sword of Truth" from Gon, but the latter snatched it from his hand before he could cast it.
